center.name: Prince Henri of Orléans
center.summary: Prince Henri of Orléans是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括灰腹噪鹛，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in south-western China and north-eastern India. The specific name of this bird commemorates Prince Henri of Orléans.{{cite book|last=Beolens|first=Bo|title=Whose Birds?
